page.title: Teams' Work
page.intro: A curated look at the people shaping Xonra's personality through fan art. You can submit on our discord some of your own fan-made content, which will be credited to you and you only. Help make this website and our projects feel more... right ahd lively.

artist.name: kritalasy
artist.description: Not very good artwork and imorovements can be made, but you can help improve it if you want by sumbitting some on our discord.
artist.headline: Visual storytelling for the Xonra world
artist.bio: This gallery highlights recent pieces from kritalasy, featuring stylized characters that give the project a more distinct visual identity. As Tze says, a "Shenanigans" feeling.
